content_body:
This is our first stay in Blue Ridge. Despite the fact that it rained all weekend, we still had a fantastic time. We came here with our 4 kids, ages 15, 10, 6, and 4. There was something for all to do, and the family time was great! Spent the day in town and enjoyed the shops, the "fudge" shop, and had lunch at "Happy Days" - good food and great ice cream. We will definitely come back here as a family and hopefully bring some more extended family. The cabin is so great and so welcoming. Thank you so much for sharing your oasis with our family.
GA
title: Spring Vacation in the North Georgia Mountains
